changeSet.author: system
system
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS deviation_containment_actions ( id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, version INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, deviation_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES deviations(id), description TEXT NOT NULL, action_type VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'CONTAINMENT', owner_id BIGINT REFERENCES users(id), due_date DATE, status VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'NOT_STARTED', completion_evidence TEXT, completion_date TIMESTAMPTZ, verified_by_id BIGINT REFERENCES users(id), verification_date TIMESTAMPTZ, comments TEXT, created_by BIGINT REFERENCES users(id), created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ ); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_dev_containment_deviation_id ON deviation_containment_actions(deviation_id);

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS deviation_impact_assessments ( id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, version INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, deviation_id BIGINT NOT NULL UNIQUE REFERENCES deviations(id), product_quality_affected VARCHAR(10), material_quality_affected VARCHAR(10), process_quality_affected VARCHAR(10), specification_impact VARCHAR(10), batch_lot_impact VARCHAR(10), quality_comments TEXT, customer_impact VARCHAR(10), patient_safety_impact VARCHAR(10), complaint_risk VARCHAR(10), recall_risk VARCHAR(10), safety_comments TEXT, regulatory_impact VARCHAR(10), reportable_event VARCHAR(10), inspection_audit_impact VARCHAR(10), compliance_comments TEXT, original_record_affected VARCHAR(10), missing_incomplete_data VARCHAR(10), unauthorized_change VARCHAR(10), traceability_affected VARCHAR(10), data_integrity_comments TEXT, overall_impact VARCHAR(20), assessment_status VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'NOT_STARTED', assessed_by_id BIGINT REFERENCES users(id), assessment_date TIMESTAMPTZ, conclusion TEXT, created_by BIGINT REFERENCES users(id), created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now() );

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS deviation_investigations ( id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, version INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, deviation_id BIGINT NOT NULL UNIQUE REFERENCES deviations(id), status VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'NOT_STARTED', investigation_owner_id BIGINT REFERENCES users(id), start_date TIMESTAMPTZ, due_date DATE, completion_date TIMESTAMPTZ, summary TEXT, evidence_reviewed TEXT, root_cause_category VARCHAR(50), root_cause_description TEXT, contributing_factors TEXT, most_probable_root_cause TEXT, root_cause_confirmed BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, analysis_method VARCHAR(40), investigation_conclusion TEXT, created_by BIGINT REFERENCES users(id), created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now() ); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_dev_investigation_deviation_id ON deviation_investigations(deviation_id);

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS deviation_linked_records ( id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, deviation_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES deviations(id), linked_record_type VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL, linked_record_id BIGINT NOT NULL, linked_record_number VARCHAR(100), notes TEXT, created_by BIGINT REFERENCES users(id), created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), UNIQUE (deviation_id, linked_record_type, linked_record_id) ); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_dev_linked_deviation_id ON deviation_linked_records(deviation_id);
